howItWorks.title: From inquiry to fruit plan in three steps

steps.title: Send your brief
steps.description: Tell us serving size, location, fruit preferences, and timing through WhatsApp or the lead form.

steps.title: Get recommendations
steps.description: A coordinator suggests seasonal combinations, delivery windows, and next-step options.

steps.title: Confirm the plan
steps.description: Your team reviews the details and books the preferred follow-up path directly with our coordinator.

leadForm.title: Get a tailored fruit box recommendation
leadForm.subtitle: Leave reachable contact details and two quick planning notes. Our team will respond with consultation options.
leadForm.successMessage: Thanks. A FreshHarvest coordinator will contact you shortly.
leadForm.consentText: By submitting, you agree to be contacted about your fruit consultation request.

links.content: We collect submitted contact details only to respond to fruit consultation requests, prepare recommendations, and coordinate follow-up. We do not sell personal information. Contact hello@freshharvest.example to request access, correction, or deletion of submitted details.
Information on this page is for consultation and lead generation only. Fruit availability, delivery windows, and service details are confirmed by the FreshHarvest team after reviewing each inquiry.

footer.disclaimer: Seasonal availability and delivery windows vary by location and inquiry details.

badges.subtext: Fast path to a human coordinator.
Lead details are used only for follow-up.
Built for teams, venues, and events.

data.title: Fruit planning that starts with real needs
data.subtitle: The page explains the consultation value before asking visitors to leave contact details.

items.title: Seasonal mix guidance

items.title: Delivery-window planning

items.title: Team preference notes

data.title: Teams mention freshness first.
data.subtitle: Review proof reinforces response speed and planning quality.

items.content: The coordinator asked the right questions and sent a clear seasonal plan for our 80-person team.
We needed fruit platters for guest arrivals. FreshHarvest helped us compare options and timing without pushing a checkout flow.

data.title: Common questions before a fruit consultation

items.question: Is this page for online purchases?
items.answer: No. The page only routes visitors to consultation and lead capture paths. Final availability and next steps are handled by the FreshHarvest team.

items.question: Can visitors request a recurring office plan?
items.answer: Yes. The inquiry path asks for team size, location, and cadence so the team can recommend a realistic plan.

items.question: What contact details are needed?
items.answer: At minimum, visitors provide a reachable email or WhatsApp contact so the coordinator can reply.

contactCta.prefilledMessage: Hi FreshHarvest, I have a question before requesting a fruit box plan.

data.title: A consultation-first fruit page
data.description: Visitors can ask questions, leave contact details, and receive follow-up without being routed into a transaction flow.
